title: Immodet
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Immodet1.jpg]] |name=Immodet |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], [[Ord Cantrell/Legends|Ord Cantrell]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Gray]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] **[[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The "Council of Blood"|Interim Ruling Council]] *[[Crimson Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I ''knew'' it was a mistake to allow ''your'' kind onto the Council.''"
"''Please, General Immodet…|Immodet and "[[Feena D'Asta (clone)|Feena D'Asta]]"|[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]]}} '''Immodet''' was an elderly [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], and one of the funders of [[Carnor Jax]]'s plan to sabotage [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Cloning/Legends|Clones]]. After Palpatine's death, Immodet became a member on Jax's [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The "Council of Blood"|Interim Ruling Council]]. After the death of [[Redd Wessel]], Immodet was the highest-ranking general in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. His troops occupied several entire [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] along the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] frontier and provided a first line of defense. A staunch [[Speciesism|xenophobist]], he was very suspicious of the aliens on the council. Immodet was poisoned by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] in an effort to increase the power of their agent within the council, a [[Feena D'Asta (clone)|clone]] of [[Feena D'Asta]]. ==Appearances== *[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]] {{1stID|Immodet}} *[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars Handbook 2: Crimson Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 2: ''Crimson Empire'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|yullacib|Acib, Y'ull}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Fleet]] |years=[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] |before=[[Redd Wessel]] |after=An [[Unidentified Imperial officer (Crimson Empire)|Imperial officer]] }} {{EndBox}} {{ImpSupreme_Commanders}} {{Interlang |de=Immodet |es=Immodet |tr=Immodet }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Army generals of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Imperial Supreme Commanders]] [[Category:Interim Ruling Council members]] [[Category:Males]]
